name: ruby-sdbm
title: ruby-sdbm
summary: simple file-based key-value store with String keys and values
description:
simple file-based key-value store with String keys and values
This package provides the `sdbm` library for Ruby, a simple file-based
key-value store with String keys and values. It used to be part of the Ruby
standard library, but as of ruby 3.0 it's no longer provided.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-sdbm because simple file-based key-value store with String keys and values.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-sdbm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-sdbm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-sdbm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
